name: /standards-monitor gap-analysis reports newly uncovered architecture sections after a diff is adopted
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: owasp-asvs}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --fetcher-stub new-section-5.2.5 --emit gaps 2>out.txt && grep -q 'gap=owasp-asvs:5.2.5' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
